(a) The department or any interested person may bring an action, including an action for an injunction, to:

(1) enforce a provision of Subchapter B; or

(b) A plaintiff other than the department may recover the plaintiff’s attorney’s fees.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 503. Dealer's & Mfr.'s Vehicle License Plates
##### § 503.093 — Action to Enforce Subchapter

(a) The department or any interested person may bring an action, including an action for an injunction, to:

    (1) enforce a provision of Subchapter B; or

    (2) prohibit a person from operating in violation of the person’s application for a general distinguishing number.

(b) A plaintiff other than the department may recover the plaintiff’s attorney’s fees.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995. Amended by Acts 1997, 75th Leg., ch. 871, Sec. 9, eff. Sept. 1, 1997.*

enforce a provision of Subchapter B; or
prohibit a person from operating in violation of the person’s application for a general distinguishing number.

subsections.text: A plaintiff other than the department may recover the plaintiff’s attorney’s fees.
